title: BASIC NEEDS - 211info
text: COMMUNITY SHARING PROGRAM BASIC NEEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides laundry vouchers, assistance with water bills, gently used clothing, hygiene items, bus passes, and financial assistance in getting state identificaton cards. 1440 Birch Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Individuals who self-identify as being low-income Hours: Monday 1:30pm-6pm, Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm Email (541) 942-2176 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 942-2176 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97424 (Lane County only), 97426, 97434, and 97451 SITE HOURS: Monday 1:30pm-6pm and Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: West on Main Street to N Street, turn right 2 blocks to Birch Street. LTD stop at Main and N Streets (2-minute walk). Services: Cleaning Products General Clothing Provision Personal/Grooming Supplies Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance Transportation Passes Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - ASSISTANCE FOR PEOPLE WITHOUT HOUSING MATERIAL GOODS - BABY SERVICES UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
